title: SheeChung Premium Apothecary Jar - 50 Oz. Large Clear Plastic Container Canister with Rust Proof Stainless Steel Lid, Laundry/Kitchen/Bathroom Vanity Countertop Storage Organizer Decor(Black)
description:
About this item
✅STORAGE MADE STYLISH - Durable high quality acrylic apothecary jar with metal Black lid combine BEAUTY and organization. It's not made of glass but it sure looks like one, pretty sturdy and very aesthetic.Please note:the jar is not airtight/sealed,the lid just sits on the jar and fits nicely on top
✅COMPACT STORAGE - Perfect Laundry Room Organization,cute detergent dispenser,functional for washer pods, fabric scent beads,dryer sheets,lint,clothesline pegs, and random pocket junk etc.JUST RIGHT for small bath bombs, ovals and rounds,makeup applicators and cosmetic sponges, wedges, guest soaps, salts ,seashells, and other decorative items.Also perfect for decorating kitchen,sitting on counter holding dishwasher packets or creamer in a stylish way
✅PREMIUM QUALITY - Made of durable high quality plastic; Rustproof black metal lid; Easy Care - clean with mild soap and water or wipe clean with a damp cloth. Removable lid and a wide mouth make accessing bathroom necessities and accessories easy and simple. Safe to use. Safe around kids and lively animals
✅MAKING HOME A BETTER SPACE:Versatile and easy to use, it will find a place in many rooms of your home,not just for the bathroom or laundry room, also PERFECT in the kitchen or living room. Keep vanity nice, dry and clean from bathroom humidity. Keep things organized and easy to get. Great for apartments, condos, dorm rooms, RVs and campers
✅SIZE - Diameter: 6.7 inch by 5 inch size. 50 oz large jar.Noted:Each jar holds 10-13 smaller golfball sized shower bombs.But if your got larger size bath bombs,such as full sized Lush bathbombs, it holds about 2-4.Check the size before your purchase.Please fell free contact us if you have any question
reviews_5s:
Another purchase for my coffee bar. I wanted store my coffee pods in this container but it’s smaller than I expected and only holds a few pods. It’s beautiful though. Doesn’t really have a seal, the lid just sits down on the top as a cover. Quality is fine for its purpose.Nice, solid canister for the price.This is perfect for holding candy at my job. Lightweight, hard acrylic jar that's not easy to break. Good size for candy, cookies, etc. Good buy!Very good quality and looks nice too.The jars are well made and are perfect right out of the well- packed box. Do not hesitate tp purchase! Whatever you plan to use these for, they are ready to use as soon as you receive the package. I love them and plan on ordering more for Christmas gifts. Think Christmas cookies, candy or whatever you plan to gift.It's perfect for what I need it for. I use it to store my tampons. I place regular, super, and super + and therefore they're readily and easily accessible to me. It's easy consolidation and storage.I love this jar. It looks and feels like glass but it’s not. Sturdy but not heavy. Right now, I have mine filled with a ton of loose colorful M&M’s with a small scoop inside. It would also be great if you filled it with wrapped Christmas candy and gave it as a gift. I’ll be ordering another one.Muy buen materialThese canisters were absolutely perfect for the laundry scent beads.This is a replacement for my initial purchase. The first container looked like it was made in pieces.
It fell apart on my counter while holding dishwasher pods. This replacement is all one piece so i don’t
expect it to fall apart. Thank you for such great customer service
reviews_1s:
I loved these for my laundry room, I have 3, however today I picked up one and the bottom completed broke off and one of the other ones is cracking now. These don't get banged around or slammed down, they hold laundry supplies so not sure why they are cracking.I loved it! I put my dishwashing pods in it and within a week it was cracked. My household claimed they never touched it. Not sure how it cracked so I’m giving it a no on durable and I purposely opted for this one hoping it wouldn’t break.Very disappointed in the size and quality! It looks like something you would buy at the Dollar General store.
It is very small.This product is very smallCame damagedThe image is deceptive. It only fits 4 bath bombs. Very smallThis jar cracked after one week. I used it to store epsom salt by our tub. The jar completely shattered shortly after cracking.I put laundry beads in this, and they stained the plastic.
It would not clean off, I tried everything.
Would not buy again.the photo makes this look a lot bigger a little disappointedReally small good for candy, cotton balls thing a like that
